title: sterculia pendula
intro: Sterculia pendula, also known as the pendulous sterculia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sterculiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sterculia pendula include its potential to treat fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of Sterculia pendula can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
